title: I Used to Be Normal: A Boyband Fangirl Story
original_title: I Used to Be Normal: A Boyband Fangirl Story
overview: The surprising coming of age story of four diverse women who have had their lives dramatically changed by their love of a boyband - Backstreet Boys, One Direction, Take That and The Beatles.
